Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.connection
  2. ExpirationOptions
  3. Condition

Uses of Enum Class
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ExpirationOptions.Condition

Packages that use ExpirationOptions.Condition
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection
Connection package providing low-level abstractions for interacting with the various Redis 'drivers'/libraries.

  • Uses of ExpirationOptions.Condition in org.springframework.data.redis.connection

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    ExpirationOptions.Condition
    Conditions to apply when changing expiration.

    in favor of RedisCommandsProvider.keyCommands().

    Set time to live for given key in seconds.

    Set time to live for given key in seconds.

    Set the expiration for given key as a UNIX timestamp.

    Set the expiration for given key as a UNIX timestamp.
